scenarios.label: Northern California trout, clear late-winter minnow and sculpin control

expectation.seasonal_story: Late-winter western trout should stay controlled with sculpin, bugger, and restrained minnow lanes rather than broad warmwater movement.

top_1_lure.why: Hair Jig / Marabou Jig fits a negative fish mood, stays in the bottom lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.

top_3_lures.why: Hair Jig / Marabou Jig fits a negative fish mood, stays in the bottom lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.
Blade Bait fits a negative fish mood, stays in the bottom lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.
Suspending Jerkbait fits a negative fish mood, stays in the bottom lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.

top_1_fly.why: Sculpin Streamer fits a negative fish mood, stays in the bottom lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.

top_3_flies.why: Sculpin Streamer fits a negative fish mood, stays in the bottom lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.
Woolly Bugger fits a negative fish mood, stays in the bottom lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.
Rabbit-Strip Leech fits a negative fish mood, stays in the bottom lane, and matches today's subtle need in clear water.

color_notes: Hair Jig / Marabou Jig: Theme: natural baitfish. Try olive/white, shad, smoke shad.
Blade Bait: Theme: white shad. Try white, pearl, white/silver.
Suspending Jerkbait: Theme: natural baitfish. Try ghost minnow, pro blue, olive shad.
Sculpin Streamer: Theme: natural baitfish. Try olive, sculpin olive, tan/olive.
Woolly Bugger: Theme: natural baitfish. Try olive, white/olive, gray/white.
Rabbit-Strip Leech: Theme: natural baitfish. Try olive/white, shad, smoke shad.
daily_profile_notes: Variables considered: temperature_condition, pressure_regime, wind_condition, light_cloud_condition, runoff_flow_disruption
